titleStmt.title: SII 6.749: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 749. (A.R. No. 266-B of 1899). ON THE NINTH ROUND PILLAR IN THE SAME VERANDAH.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vīraśrī gajapati gauḍesvara navakoṭi karnāṭa kalavarakesvara śrīgovindadeva māhārājāṅka vije subharāije samasta
Aṭa 8 Aṅka śrāhi kakaḍā di 8 kri 14 sukaravāre . Ariaraki prakaraṇa pasāpāleka prakaraṇa narasiṅgapaṇḍita sihā
karapatratilā . Āmbhamānaṅkara sāsana desa Uḍādibhittare . Uṇḍelapāṭa . voḍāḍa gāe . E rākivā . pūrva Āmbhamānaṅkara sāsana
jāthilṛ [.] paṇakari harilāro haricandanamāhāpatre Ecāara sacchīkari . pūrvatamā gaḍā brahmaṇe rājā brāhmaṇe Uḍādi sīmāra narasiṅgha deulara
narasiṅghanātha devaṅkara vasivā pū 15 mo Ambha brāhmaṇa sisiprakaraṇaṅkararakivā [.] govindadeu ṭākuraṅka Āi sikāsārthe . pramāṇapū
rvaka kari deri . gadādhara māhāpātraṅka Āijñā dele . pramesvaraṅka dei pramesvarakū thilṛ . E brāhmaṇamānaṅkara rakivā . Ehākuthi
voli Āijñā [.] dei ra . gadādharamāhāpātre thāi Uṇḍela ṭa 32 kā prathamāraā prakaraṇakū dasativā [.] Evasaja
la Āraā prakaraṇara bhoga 10 [.] narasiṅghapaṇḍita rā 1 Uruṇasiṅgha nāthaṭhakū(śi)ṭi 1 [.] pāe tivā 32 . toḍāḍagrāma 1 to
ṇe kariga 1 Āce Apasamāṇeka ṭa 1 purusottama pasāpāleka ṭa 1 [.] valabhapaṭanāyaka
Apara pasapāleṅka siṅghapasapāleka ṭa 1 [.] siṅghūpasāpāleka ṭa 1 [.] Āne Athaye siṅghūpasāpāleka ṭa 1 Āpasamāle ṭa 1 rāme
sapāleka ṭa le Āmbharajā ṭa 1 [.] narasiṅghapaṇḍita ṭa 1 [.] Upūḍi siṅghanābhaṭa ṭa 1 [.] vīḍānarasiṅgha pasā kūṭaga . Udāragū
(16) Ehi samāje jahāra (ṭicāse) Āekarive [.] joparīkṣā pūrve para kathānaka je pramāṇakū jale
narasiṅghanāthadevaṅkū drohakalāra dosa saiva . deulara rikū sasakāsi mā va . Ethira desara
hā nīrṇṇaī [.] hāmbhara sanamata . Ethiki Ānakahivākū nāhi . Etha kū Ana Edhuki
Digital edition of SII 6.749 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
